scripts.build: bun run build-components && bun run build-templates
scripts.build-templates: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks","../components","../../dist/components"]'
scripts.build-components: mkdir -p dist/components && mjml src/components/*.mjml -o dist/components/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks"]' && node -e "const fs=require('fs');[...fs.readdirSync('dist/components')].filter(f=>f.endsWith('.html')).forEach(f=>{const h=fs.readFileSync('dist/components/'+f,'utf8');const customStyles=[];const re=/<style[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/style>/gi;let m;while((m=re.exec(h))!==null){if(!/#outlook|\.mj-outlook|@media only screen|\.moz-text-html/.test(m[1])){customStyles.push(m[0]);}}const body=h.match(/<body[^>]*>([\s\S]*)<\/body>/i);if(body)fs.writeFileSync('dist/components/'+f,(customStyles.length?customStyles.join('\n')+'\n':'')+body[1]);})"
scripts.build-watch: bun run build-components-watch & bun run build-templates-watch
scripts.build-minify: bun run build-components-minify && bun run build-templates-minify
scripts.build-templates-minify: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks","../components","../../dist/components"]' --config.minify true
scripts.build-components-minify: mkdir -p dist/components && mjml src/components/*.mjml -o dist/components/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.includePath '["../_styles","../blocks"]' --config.minify true && node -e "const fs=require('fs');[...fs.readdirSync('dist/components')].filter(f=>f.endsWith('.html')).forEach(f=>{const h=fs.readFileSync('dist/components/'+f,'utf8');const customStyles=[];const re=/<style[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/style>/gi;let m;while((m=re.exec(h))!==null){if(!/#outlook|\.mj-outlook|@media only screen|\.moz-text-html/.test(m[1])){customStyles.push(m[0]);}}const body=h.match(/<body[^>]*>([\s\S]*)<\/body>/i);if(body)fs.writeFileSync('dist/components/'+f,(customStyles.length?customStyles.join('\n')+'\n':'')+body[1]);})"
